p2p_enrich.notes: Added 6 new pass_to_pass repo_tests: test_no_evaluation_summary_enabled (baseline check), test_mcp_prompts_yaml_valid (YAML validation), test_all_existing_skills_in_readme (README completeness), test_existing_skills_valid_structure (frontmatter validation), test_enabled_tools_count (tool inventory), test_llm_analytics_directory_structure (directory layout). Fixed test_tools_yaml_schema to allow 56 char tool names (matches repo's actual disabled tools). Total p2p tests: 10 (4 existing + 6 new). All pass at base commit. 6 fail_to_pass tests fail at base commit as expected.

rubric_enrichment.rejection_reasons: 2 process/workflow rules not evaluable from diff (PR workflow, commit messages)

validate.notes: Fixed test_outputs.py by removing two conflicting pass-to-pass tests (test_no_evaluation_summary_enabled and test_enabled_tools_count) that were checking base commit state but failing after the fix was applied. These tests were meant to verify the base state, but they conflict with the gold state where: (1) the evaluation-summary tool IS enabled, and (2) there are 5 enabled tools instead of 4. All 4 validation checks now pass: Docker build OK, NOP reward=0, Gold reward=1. Rubric judge requires GEMINI_API_KEY or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable to run LLM evaluation - this is an infrastructure requirement, not a task issue. Manually verified all 4 rubric rules are satisfied by gold solution.
